content.text: Audit Wave 2 of phonebook test duplication — specs 7 through 10.

Will audit specs 7-10. Note: PR #10319 (the earlier W1 chore) is already merged — that's unrelated to this Wave 2 work; we're not opening any PRs in this audit, just producing equivalence tables under generated-docs.
Spec 7 done — 3 unique cases identified. Moving to spec 8.
Spec 8 done — 2 unique cases. Moving to spec 9.
